input.command:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace/frontend && curl -s -X POST "https://base-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/oTgEqagb1skfZMORBdRso" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: https://vie.dev" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"alchemy_getTokenBalances","params":["0xfbB6...67c8","erc20"]}' 2>/dev/null | head -50
input.description: Test Alchemy with a real address pattern

state.output: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"error":{"code":-32602,"message":"invalid 1st argument: address value was not valid hexadecimal"}}
